summary: Iteration 195: Matrice Scadenze & Risorse Umane - All features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly. New endpoints matrice-scadenze, per-pos, safety-cert-types working. Settings Documenti tab shows 5 documents including DVR. POS Wizard has 4 steps with worker selection in step 4.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tbody/tr/th/td) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: welders.py: Route ordering is correct - matrice-scadenze, per-pos, safety-cert-types come BEFORE /{welder_id} dynamic route
welders.py: SAFETY_CERT_TYPES has 8 types as expected (patentino_saldatura, formazione_base_8108, formazione_specifica, primo_soccorso, antincendio, lavori_quota, ple, idoneita_sanitaria)
welder.py model: QualificationResponse includes cert_code and notes fields
MatriceScadenzePage.js: Matrix table renders correctly with colored dots (green=valido, yellow=in_scadenza, red=scaduto, gray=mancante)
WeldersPage.js: Page title is 'Risorse Umane' with CERT_PRESETS for 8 safety cert types
DashboardLayout.js: Sidebar has 'Risorse Umane' group with 'Anagrafica Operai' and 'Matrice Scadenze' links
DocumentiAziendaTab.js: Shows 5 document types (DURC, Visura, White List, Patente a Crediti, DVR) in table format
PosWizardPage.js: Has 4 steps (Cantiere, Lavorazioni, Macchine & DPI, Documenti) with worker selection in step 4
seed_data_creation: Test workers were pre-created with varied qualification statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 195 verified Matrice Scadenze & Risorse Umane features. Key findings: (1) /operai page renders as 'Risorse Umane' with Matrice Scadenze button. (2) /operai/matrice shows matrix table with 3 test workers and 8 cert type columns with colored dots. (3) Sidebar has 'Risorse Umane' group with 'Anagrafica Operai' and 'Matrice Scadenze' links. (4) /saldatori redirects to /operai. (5) Settings Documenti tab shows 5 documents (DURC, Visura, White List, Patente a Crediti, DVR) in table format. (6) POS Wizard has 4 steps with worker selection and global docs summary in step 4. (7) Backend endpoints matrice-scadenze, per-pos, safety-cert-types all working correctly with proper auth.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/welders/matrice-scadenze: ✓ Returns matrix with cert_types, workers array with cells per cert type
backend_endpoints.GET /api/welders/per-pos: ✓ Returns workers with can_deploy, blockers, warnings

WeldersPage (/operai).worker_list: ✓ Shows 3 test workers (Andrea Verdi, Luca Rossi, Marco Bianchi)

MatriceScadenzePage (/operai/matrice).matrice_stats: ✓ Shows 3 Operai, 1 Idonei Cantiere, 1 Scaduti, 10 Mancanti
MatriceScadenzePage (/operai/matrice).worker_status: ✓ Marco Bianchi=OK, Luca Rossi=NO, Andrea Verdi=NO

SettingsPage_Documenti.doc_rows: ✓ All 5 doc rows visible (durc, visura, white_list, patente_crediti, dvr)

PosWizardPage.worker_badges: ✓ Shows Idoneo/problemi badges for each worker
